title: Junior Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited
company: Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited:
Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oxford University Press India Advisory Limited!
